report.summary: Community growth cycle v15 (Mar 16): Day 33 publish batch amplified — 4 exchange reviews (Binance/Kraken/Bybit/OKX) + BTCFi + Kaito InfoFi + Aave V4 promoted across social/newsletter; weekend calendar (Sat Mar 21–Sun Mar 22) filled for first time; Sprint 59 poll corrected (exchange reviews now live, replaced with Options Chain Viewer option); social-exchange-reviews-2026.svg social card created; newsletter expanded to 8 featured items; social count now 334+ pages.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Mon Mar 16): Exchange reviews launch — '4 biggest exchanges, side by side. No paid placements.' with fee/user stats for Binance/Kraken/Bybit/OKX; CTA to /exchanges/reviews
Discord/Telegram (Mon Mar 16): Exchange reviews drop — deep-dive announcement with fee structure + security + products coverage summary; direct links to all 4 review pages
Twitter thread (Sat Mar 21, 6 posts): BTCFi — Bitcoin DeFi $7.1B TVL thread; Babylon Labs $4.2B, Merlin, Stacks, BEVM; yield categories, risk matrix, full guide CTA
Tweet (Sat Mar 21): Kaito AI InfoFi — 'your social attention as a tradeable asset'; Yaps, KAITO token, Kaito Connect; CTA to /learn/kaito-ai-infofi-guide
Tweet (Sun Mar 22): Aave V4 DeFi Sunday — unified liquidity layer, smart accounts (EIP-7702), dynamic risk params, liquidation engine rewrite; $20B TVL; CTA to /learn/aave-v4-guide
Newsletter (Thu Mar 19) v15 additions: 4 exchange review cards + BTCFi section + Kaito InfoFi + Aave V4; 3 new subject lines (D/E/F); total newsletter now covers 8 featured items
Sprint 59 poll correction (Fri Mar 20): Removed 'More exchange reviews (Bybit/OKX/Kraken)' — now live; replaced with 'Options chain viewer (BTC/ETH live options data)'; updated page count to 334+

sections.title: Visual Assets Created
items: social-exchange-reviews-2026.svg — 1200×630 social card: 4 glass-morphism exchange cards (Binance/Kraken/Bybit/OKX) with brand-color accents, user counts, maker fees, feature tags, and 10-point rating scores; headline 'Exchange Reviews 2026 — Independent deep-dives. No paid placements. Just the data.'; stat pills (4 Exchanges, 350M+ Users Combined, Fees · Security · Products); bottom bar with degen0x.com/exchanges/reviews URL. Saved to /public/social-exchange-reviews-2026.svg

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: PUBLISH_QUEUE is now empty — all 334+ pages live after Day 33 batch (7 pages: 4 exchange reviews + 3 learn guides). This is a milestone: zero backlog for the first time.

Exchange review pages (Binance, Kraken, Bybit, OKX) are the highest-value affiliate pages on the site — each review targets head terms ('best crypto exchange', 'binance review 2026') with high commercial intent. These pages need to be indexed before FOMC week search spikes.

FOMC catalyst T-3 days (Wed Mar 19): Full social calendar now covers Mon Mar 16 through Sun Mar 22 — 7-day complete coverage for the first time. v14 had gaps on weekends; v15 fills them with BTCFi thread (Sat) and Aave V4 (Sun).

Sprint 59 poll corrected: The v14 poll listed Bybit/OKX/Kraken as 'build next' options — but those pages are now live. The corrected poll options now include 'Options chain viewer' as a new buildable feature, keeping the sprint planning signal accurate.

GSC organic signal window: Day 16 of 14-21. First clicks expected today or tomorrow. The 4 exchange reviews joining the index now means affiliate revenue pages are in the GSC queue just as organic signals arrive.
